items.title: Circle’s outperformance highlights USDC’s staying power, says bullish Wall Street analyst
items.summary: William Blair said Circle’s recent rally reflects more than macro factors, pointing to USDC resilience and growing recognition of the firm’s stablecoin infrastructure advantage.
